design_system.archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Industrial Control Room Variant)
design_system.emotional_tone: Utilitarian, hyper-clear, objective, and urgent. Must look like a mission-critical tactical interface on a factory floor.

hierarchy_rules.h1_big_screen: text-6xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-[5vw] font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none
hierarchy_rules.general: No generic sans for headings. Use Chivo for strict geometric technical feel, IBM Plex Sans for legible data.

colors.rules: Contrast ratios must exceed 4.5:1. Red/Orange used strictly for shortages against dark backgrounds.

layout.spacing: Tight (gap-4) on the matrix. Use generous padding (p-8) for main containers to avoid edge collision.
layout.grid_rules: Strict alignment. Main schedule board must use 'Grid Borders' style (exposed skeleton, border-collapse).
layout.alignment: Left-align tabular data and headers. Top-left F-pattern for primary KPIs like the Date.

surfaces.matrix_cells: Flat background, 1px solid border (border-white/15), NO shadow. Hover state: bg-white/5.
surfaces.alerts: Sharp 1px border with high-contrast text. For shortages: bg-red-950/30 border-red-500.
surfaces.modals_setup: Solid dark grey backgrounds (#1A1A1A) with 1px border-white/10. No glassmorphism.

components.schedule_matrix: Custom HTML/Tailwind grid or table. sticky top headers for assembly lines, sticky left column for details.
components.absent_selector: Dense scrollable list of chips or Shadcn Checkboxes for the 77 people.
components.action_buttons: Shadcn Button, styled flat, rectangular (rounded-none or rounded-sm), 1px borders.
components.data_testid_requirement: All interactive elements, cells, buttons, and inputs MUST include data-testid attributes.

icons.usage: Use bold weights. Keep it minimal and functional.

motion_and_interactions.rules: Minimalist. Use animate-pulse ONLY for critical shortage warnings.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Explicitly set hover:text-white and hover:bg-white/10 on interactive rows.

image_urls.description: High-tech factory assembly line. Apply bg-black/80 overlay. Use behind the setup/configuration screens.
Manufacturing engineer portrait. Use for profile avatars or Persons list.

media.rules: NEVER use placeholder services like dummyimage or placehold.it. Use these specific URLs.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Hybrid Fullstack app focusing on an 'Admin Setup View' and a 'Big Screen TV Dashboard View'.
Font Setup: Import 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Dashboard Matrix: Implement a highly legible CSS Grid or Table. Left column = 'Details/Sub-tasks', Top row = 'Assembly Lines'. Inside cells = 'Assigned Person Names'.
Grid Borders Strategy: Apply 1px solid borders (border-white/15) between all cells. No rounded corners inside the matrix.
Shortage Warnings: If algorithm detects missing personnel, style the cell with border-red-500, text-red-500, and include a pulsing warning icon. MUST be extremely visible from a distance.
Setup Screen: Build a dense UI for selecting Date, toggling Active Assembly Lines, and a searchable chip-list to mark absent persons out of the 77 people.
Algorithm Logic (UI representation): Ensure the backend/frontend logic handles 'Specialist First' and 'One assignment per person per day' and correctly maps them to the UI state.
Export & Upload: Add prominent utility buttons (Volt Blue or clear outlined buttons) for 'Upload Excel' and 'Export PDF/Excel' in the header area.
Testing: Add data-testid to EVERY clickable element and schedule cell.
